query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM books b WHERE (? IS NULL OR b.id IN (SELECT book_id FROM book_files WHERE format = ?)) AND (? IS NULL OR b.metadata_status = ?) AND (? IS NULL OR b.id IN (SELECT book_id FROM book_authors WHERE author_id = ?)) AND (? IS NULL OR b.id IN (SELECT book_id FROM book_series WHERE series_id = ?)) AND (? IS NULL OR b.id IN (SELECT book_id FROM book_tags WHERE tag_id IN (SELECT value FROM json_each(?)))) AND (? IS NULL OR b.publisher_id = ?)
